title: [phase:critique] [family:ui-runtime-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review the current Happy production resolution. Facts: production /happy/ serves updated HTML with Live Session wired to /cockpit; /cockpit returns 200; unauthenticated GET /api/happy/state,/events,/task-detail return 401 by design...
summary_text: - **Medium**: Cleanup idempotency guard is set *before* cleanup succeeds, so any `runD1` failure permanently suppresses retry and can leave prod state dirty (`cleanupDone = true` at start of `cleanup()`). This defeats recovery from transient D1 failures and from the `finally` path retry opportunity ([smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js:203), [smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js:205), [smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js:215), [smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js:331)). - **Medium**: `smokeTaskId` is still recorded only after `runHappySmoke(...)` fully resolves. If intake succeeds and then task-detail/recovery fails (or signal arrives), cleanup runs without task id and cannot delete created smoke task/events ([smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js:318), [smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js:323), [smoke-happy-api.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-api.js:136), [smoke-happy-api.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-api.js:162)).
